description.value:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

You channel extra spores into one of your spore pods, preparing it to choke your target. Make a spore pod Strike. If it hits, you deal spore pod damage as normal and your target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 2} on a critical failure). You also gain the critical specialization effect for your spore pod Strike.
